violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The storage shelves in the walk in cooler need to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The fan guard for the walk in cooler cooling unit needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceilings and walls in the kitchen need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken floor tile under the cooking equipment. There is a large gap in f the floor by the back door.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Bottles of Lysol cleaner were stored next to, and over single service utensils on the white shelves by the cash register.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. A wet wiping cloth was stored on the counter by the rice cookers.

Time as a public health control. — --Food was not marked or identified with the time within which it must be cooked, served, or discarded. Chicken in a pan on the cooking equipment temped between 79 and 112 degrees. Item was not marked with a time it must be used or discarded. Product was not kept above 140 degrees.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. The cooling unit in the walk in cooler is dripping onto the floor of the walk in cooler.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not clean or kept in good repair. Walls by the toilets in both bathrooms have broken sheet rock.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken and cracked floor tile by the three comp sink and by the cooking equipment. Large gap in the floor by the back door.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
